# Revis Studio

> Revis Studio is a New York atelier of skilled craftsmen and expert weavers, founded in 2001 by Toby Revis. The studio takes a custom carpet from inspiration through design and manufacturing to final presentation. Rugs are made with Tibetan long-staple wool, batch-dyed with natural vegetable pigments or premium Swiss dyes, and traditionally woven in Nepal.

## Studio
- **Founded:** 2001
- **Founder:** Toby Revis (Syracuse University, University of Madrid, New York School of Interior Design; previously certified gemologist at Van Cleef & Arpels and senior buyer at Tiffany & Co. for the Elsa Peretti collection)
- **Address:** 225 East 74th Street, #6N, New York, NY 10021
- **Phone:** +1 212 987 8544 (studio) · +1 917 293 0707 (cell)
- **Email:** toby@revisstudio.com
- **Instagram:** @revisstudio
